title: Spicy Portuguese Kielbasa Burger
description: A spicy, silky burger featuring smoked Portuguese kielbasa, pickles, and diabetic-friendly ingredients for a date-night dish.

ingredients.name: smoked portuguese kielb: 100g
ingredients.notes: smoked portuguese kielbasa (e.g., chouriço) for authentic spice

ingredients.name: diced red onion
ingredients.notes: adds a subtle sweetness and crunch

ingredients.name: diced pickle
ingredients.notes: for tangy crunch; choose sugar-free pickles

ingredients.name: diabetic-friendly bun
ingredients.notes: low-carb, gluten-free option like a whole wheat roll

ingredients.name: spicy mayo
ingredients.notes: mix 5ml vegan mayo, 10ml apple cider vinegar, 1 tsp chili flakes for heat

instructions: Prepare smoked portuguese kielbasa by slicing into 1cm thick pieces.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat (150°C/300°F) for 2 minutes.
Add kielbasa slices and cook until browned (3-4 minutes).
In a small bowl, mix spicy mayo with diced onion and pickle for dressing.
Place kielbasa on the bun, top with the spicy mayo mixture, and serve immediately.
